Chinese shot put athlete Gong Lijiao is preparing for her fourth Olympic Games in Paris this year. The 35-year-old, a three-time Olympic medalist, gave her best performance at the 2020 Tokyo Olympic Games, winning her first Olympic gold medal in the women's shot put event. In this episode of our series Like No Other featuring Chinese women, Gong shares her perspectives on achieving personal goals and overcoming challenges -- both on and off the field.
